calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-11-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Brenda Fields, CSR #7235.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Gary Looney, President of Creditors Trade Association, Inc., was placed under oath but did not testify.
Mary Johnson, Senior Credit Analyst for US Food Service, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Arden Village Lifestyle Limited Partnership, A California Limited Partnership, dba Red Lion Hotel.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 7, 2-11.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, October 11, 2011.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, and against defendant Arden Village Lifestyle Limited Partnership, a California Limited Partnership, dba Red Lion Hotel, as follows:

Principal - $3,100.25.
Interest - $1,684.96.
Attorney Fees - Reserved - To be determined by motion.
Costs - $585.00.

Total - $5,370.21.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-11-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-07-2011 Set For Trial On Oct-11-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff. Case is ordered scheduled for Court Trial on 10/11/2011 at 9:00 AM, in Department 206. Court to give Notice of the Trial Date. Proceedings not reported. (610)
